description: Registry is the system-level index of all active contracts. It maps routes, pages, contract files, receipt behavior, dedupe behavior, and canonical write targets.

authRequired.description: Whether authenticated access is required for this route.

dedupeKey.description: Path expression used to detect duplicate submissions or deliveries.

endpoint.description: Absolute endpoint URL for the route governed by the contract.

id.description: Stable canonical identifier for the contract registry entry. Use lowercase snake_case.

path.description: Repo path to the canonical contract file.

receiptSource.description: Source identifier used in receipt key generation.

signatureRequired.description: Whether delivery signature verification is required.

usedOnPages.description: Pages, shells, or views that depend on this contract.

version.description: Canonical version number of the contract.

writes.description: Canonical collections written by this contract, such as accounts, orders, profiles, receipts, support.
